---
pagetitle: "Feature Engineering A-Z | Spatial Embedding"
image: social-cards/spatial-embedding.png
---

# 🏗️ Spatial Embedding {#sec-spatial-embedding}

::: {style="visibility: hidden; height: 0px;"}
## Spatial Embedding
:::

WIP

## Pros and Cons

### Pros

### Cons

## R Examples

## Python Examples
